landing.hero:
Hire with precision.
Lead with confidence.
landing.subHero: Tarsheeh.cv screens every candidate, scores every CV, and delivers your shortlist — ranked, reasoned, and ready — in minutes.
landing.missionBody: Recruitment should not require a dedicated team to do well. Tarsheeh.cv is a multi-agent AI platform that makes the entire process Something to businesses can run without the overhead of a full HR operation team, and effortless for those that already have one. It reads every CV, evaluates every candidate against your job profile, and returns a ranked shortlist with full reasoning in minutes, not days.
landing.howItWorksIntro: Five specialised agents read every CV, score every candidate against the job profile, and returns a ranked shortlist with full reasoning. Post a role. Upload CVs. Receive your shortlist in minutes.
landing.screeningSub: Every candidate evaluated against the same criteria, without fatigue or bias.
landing.rankingSub: A scored shortlist with clear reasoning, not a pile of files to sort through.
landing.interviewPhrase: Questions that reveal character, not just competence.
landing.interviewSub: Tailored questions for each candidate, ready before the first interview is booked.
